basic_details.job_title: IIM Kashipur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Academic Assistant/ Associate Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Kashipur has released the official Academic Assistant/ Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification under Advertisement No. AA-07/2026. The notification invites online applications for contractual Academic Assistant and Academic Associate positions. Candidates preferably below 35 years of age with a first-class postgraduate degree (B.Sc./ B.A./ M.Sc./ M.A. in Economics) for the Academic Assistant post or a Ph.D. in the relevant area for the Academic Associate post are eligible to apply. Interested candidates can submit their online applications on or before 28 July 20

age_limit.details: Preferably below 35 years. Maximum Age Limit for Academic Assistant/ Associate: 35 years.

qualification.education_qualification: For Academic Assistant: Post-graduate with first class, BSc/BA in Economics or MSc/MA in Economics or both. Experience in academics or industry or M. Phil preferred. For Academic Associate: Ph.D. in relevant area.
qualification.details: Academic Assistant: Post-graduate with first class BSc/ BA in Economics or MSc/ MA in Economics or both Relevant experience either in academics or industry or an M. Phil [or higher qualifications] will be preferred. Academic Associate: Ph.D. in relevant area.

salary_details.pay_scale: Academic Assistant: Rs. 27,500/- to Rs. 32,000/- per month. Academic Associate: Rs. 33,000/- to Rs. 39,000/- per month.
salary_details.details: Academic Assistant: Rs. 27,500/- to Rs. 32,000/- per month. Rs. 27,500/- per month for no experience. Increment of Rs. 1500/- may be recommended for every completed year of relevant academic / industrial job experience, subject to the maximum ceiling of Rs. 32,000/- per month. Academic Associate: Rs. 33,000/- to Rs. 39,000/- per month. Rs. 33,000/- per month for Ph.D. (or equivalent). Increment of Rs. 2000/- may be recommended for every completed year of relevant academic / industrial job experience, subject to the maximum ceiling of Rs. 39,000/- per month.

selection_process: Shortlisted candidates will be interviewed in person or online.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kashipur Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kashipur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.indian_institute_of_management_kashipur: Academic Assistant: Rs. 27,500/- to Rs. 32,000/- per month. Academic Associate: Rs. 33,000/- to Rs. 39,000/- per month.

For Academic Assistant: Post-graduate with first class, BSc/BA in Economics or MSc/MA in Economics or both. Experience in academics or industry or M. Phil preferred. For Academic Associate: Ph.D. in relevant area.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kashipur Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIM Kashipur Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIM Kashipur Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIM Kashipur Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Academic Assistant: Post-graduate with first class BSc/ BA in Economics or MSc/ MA in Economics or both Relevant experience either in academics or industry or an M. Phil [or higher qualifications] will be preferred. Academic Associate: Ph.D. in relevant area.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kashipur Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Preferably below 35 years. Maximum Age Limit for Academic Assistant/ Associate: 35 years.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kashipur Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Academic Assistant: Rs. 27,500/- to Rs. 32,000/- per month. Rs. 27,500/- per month for no experience. Increment of Rs. 1500/- may be recommended for every completed year of relevant academic / industrial job experience, subject to the maximum ceiling of Rs. 32,000/- per month. Academic Associate: Rs. 33,000/- to Rs. 39,000/- per month. Rs. 33,000/- per month for Ph.D. (or equivalent). Increment of Rs. 2000/- may be recommended for every completed year of relevant academic / industrial job experience, subject to the maximum ceiling of Rs. 39,000/- per month.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kashipur Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisted candidates will be interviewed in person or online.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Kashipur Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kashipur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Kashipur Academic Assistant/Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the IIM Kashipur Academic Assistant/Associate positions is 28th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Academic Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Academic Assistant post, candidates must have a Post-graduate degree with first class, and a BSc/BA in Economics or MSc/MA in Economics or both.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for the Academic Assistant position?
faq.answer: While not mandatory, relevant experience in academics or industry, or an M. Phil degree, is preferred for the Academic Assistant role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification for the Academic Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Academic Associate position must hold a Ph.D. in a relevant area.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for these positions?
faq.answer: The age limit for both Academic Assistant and Academic Associate positions is preferably below 35 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for an Academic Assistant?
faq.answer: The salary for an Academic Assistant ranges from Rs. 27,500/- to Rs. 32,000/- per month, with potential increments based on experience.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for an Academic Associate?
faq.answer: The salary for an Academic Associate ranges from Rs. 33,000/- to Rs. 39,000/- per month, with potential increments based on experience.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the IIM Kashipur recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official IIM Kashipur website or the direct link provided in the 'Important Links' section.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: Shortlisted candidates will be invited for an interview, which may be conducted in person or online.
